Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Benji]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Benji is an assassin trained by Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Benji is a man who was once a boy and is currently in a cell.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Benji is one of Shera's false Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Benji is a pseudo-Gardener trained by Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Benji carries a pair of shears that must be Lucan's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Benji is a newly minted Gardener who wants to become Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Benji is a Reader who completed the Awakening process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Benji floats in a cloud of purple-light butterflies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Benji can lift Shera over.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
